title: berberis nummularia var. pyrocarpa
intro: Berberis nummularia var. pyrocarpa, also known as the copper berry or red barberry, is a variety of the barberry plant, native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is a shrub-like plant with bright red or copper-colored berries that have been used for their medicinal properties. The plant contains berberine, a compound with antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and infections. Berberis nummularia var. pyrocarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions to take advantage of its health benefits, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine.
